\doxysubsubsection*{Classes}
\begin{DoxyCompactItemize}
\item 
class \mbox{\hyperlink{classPlaneWave}{Plane\+Wave}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Models a plane wave as an incident field in homogeneous or layered media. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Defines the \doxylink{classPlaneWave}{Plane\+Wave} class\+: representation of a plane‐wave incident field. 

Supports both homogeneous and layered media cases. Provides field evaluation, integration with basis functions, and data export. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{PlaneWave_8h_source}{Plane\+Wave.\+h}}.
